title: Michel Learns to Code
text: I am a data specialist, currently working in a conglomerate in the Philippines. Currently, I’m a 2nd year Artificial Intelligence PhD student. My research interest is in unstructured data, particularly computer vision, multi-modal models, large language and vision models, and remote sensing / geosatellite applications of machine learning. On the side, I teach / mentor about Data Science in FTW Foundation. I manage a tech data community, Data Engineering Pilipinas. One of my goals is to eventually build free and open source materials that will enable free data bootcamps in the Philippines.
